title: Move hardcoded API key from prod.exs to runtime.exs
prompt:
The following config has a hardcoded Stripe API key committed to source:

```elixir
# prod.exs
import Config
config :my_app, :stripe_secret, "sk_live_abc123_real_key"
```

Move this to `config/runtime.exs` and read the secret from an environment variable via `System.fetch_env!/1` (raises if unset). Write the corrected `runtime.exs` to `config/runtime.exs`. The value must be looked up via `System.fetch_env!("STRIPE_SECRET")`.
research_citation: GuardRails: 'Hardcoding secrets in the configuration files... can lead to security vulnerabilities, as these secrets might end up in version control systems.'
